g.text: CI/CD pipeline: build, test, scan, stage, canary, promote — with rollback branches
Scan image: trivy + Snyk + SAST analysis
Deploy to staging: helm upgrade --set image.tag=sha-a1b2c3d
Canary deploy: 5% traffic split via Istio VirtualService
Deployment complete: all pods healthy, zero downtime
Automatic rollback: revert to previous stable image
Slack alert: canary failed, rollback executed, logs attached
Block: critical CVE found in base image
Pipeline blocked: fix CVE-2024-XXXX before merge
Full pipeline: push → production in ~45 minutes (happy path)
Shift-left security: scan runs before any deployment
Canary analysis uses statistical comparison against baseline window
